installCommand: npm install -g pnpm@10 && cd ../.. && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://openrouter.ai https://google.serper.dev https://*.meilisearch.io https://autocomplete.clearbit.com https://*.axiom.co https://*.honeycomb.io https://*.datadoghq.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=(), payment=(), usb=(), accelerometer=(), gyroscope=()
